hero.headline:
The art of care,
in service
of your radiance
hero.subheadline: If you feel tired and stressed after a long day, you deserve the best. Come experience our treatments that regenerate body and mind.

about.label: Jana — Founder
about.heading:
A holistic approach
to well-being
about.body: My holistic approach aims to restore the physical, emotional and spiritual balance of each person. I am committed to improving the overall well-being of every individual, drawing on my experience gained in Central Europe, where the cult of beauty is an important tradition and techniques are particularly advanced.
about.body2: My goal is to offer treatments that go beyond appearance, nourishing and harmonizing body and mind.

values.title: Balance
values.text: Restoring physical, emotional and spiritual harmony for each person.

values.title: Expertise
values.text: Advanced techniques rooted in the European tradition of beauty.

values.title: Personalization
values.text: Every treatment is tailored to your specific needs and goals.

massages.label: Wellness Massages
massages.heading:
Rediscover your
deep balance
massages.body: I offer a diverse range of relaxing and rebalancing massages. Each massage is accompanied by nutritional advice and naturopathic recommendations, to offer you a complete and holistic wellness experience.

soins.label: Our Treatments
soins.heading:
Beauty
from within
soins.body: My treatments are designed to help you effectively fight the effects of aging and stress. I have developed a unique method of manual face lifting, combined with pure oxygen and natural products.

services.name: Anaj Beauty Signature Massage
services.description: The Anaj Beauty Signature Massage is more than a simple treatment: it is a luxurious and personalized experience combining advanced techniques, aromatherapy and oxygen therapy. Designed for absolute well-being, this massage targets muscle tension, stimulates blood circulation and offers deep relaxation.

services.name: Madotherapy
services.description: Madotherapy is an innovative and natural technique that uses specially designed wooden tools to massage deeply and transform the appearance of the skin. Originating from Latin America, this ancestral method has become a world reference for reducing cellulite, firming tissues and promoting effective detoxification.

services.name: Rebalancing Slimming Treatment
services.description: The Rebalancing Slimming Treatment is a unique experience combining advanced body reshaping techniques and energetic well-being. This treatment combines madotherapy and plantar reflexology for visible results and restored inner harmony.

services.name: Renata França Drainage
services.description: The Renata França Drainage is a revolutionary method combining advanced lymphatic drainage techniques to reshape and revitalize the body. Known for its spectacular results from the very first session, this treatment is ideal for reducing swelling, eliminating toxins and refining the silhouette.

contact.label: Contact & Appointments
contact.heading:
Your moment
of well-being starts here
